articles.description: Champions League reaction: Pressure builds on Spurs boss Igor Tudor after Antonin Kinsky move backfires in Atletico Madrid defeat.
articles.title: Champions League reaction: Pressure builds on Spurs boss Tudor after Kinsky move backfires

articles.description: Tottenham replace goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky in the 17th minute after conceding three goals inside the opening quarter of an hour of the Champions League last-16 tie at Atletico Madrid.
articles.title: Antonin Kinsky: Spurs replace keeper after conceding three goals inside 15 minutes

articles.description: US President Donald Trump has said Iran are "welcome" to take part in this summer's World Cup despite the countries being at war, according to Fifa president Gianni Infantino.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Donald Trump will welcome Iran - Gianni Infantino

articles.description: The Miami Heat's Bam Adebayo scores 83 points in a game, surpassing Kobe Bryant and second only to the great Wilt Chamberlain.
articles.title: NBA: Bam Adebayo scores 83 points as Miami Heat beat Washington Wizards

articles.description: Igor Tudor's Spurs tenure could already be on the line after a disastrous defeat against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.
articles.title: Is Tudor's Spurs reign almost up after only four games?

articles.description: Eddie Howe's Newcastle were so close to a famous European victory, but now face a herculean second-leg task after Lamine Yamal's late penalty.
articles.title: Champions League: Newcastle's sense of missed opportunity after late Barca blow

articles.description: England head coach Steve Borthwick says the shirt has "weighed heavy" on some of his players at times in a disappointing Six Nations campaign.
articles.title: Steve Borthwick admits pressure has hit England's Six Nations campaign

articles.description: Guillem Balague analyses the rise of Paris St-Germain's Georgian superstar Khvicha Kvaratskhelia.
articles.title: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia: How PSG's Georgia winger became a Champions League winner

articles.description: One of the seven women who received visas has reversed her decision after speaking to teammates, minister says
articles.title: Member of Iranian football delegation granted Australian asylum changes her mind

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka eases into the quarter-finals at Indian Wells with a 6-2 6-4 victory over Naomi Osaka.
articles.title: Indian Wells: Aryna Sabalenka into quarter-finals with 6-2 6-4 win over Naomi Osaka
